reports.title: Total Wallets
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Pump.fun Seeds
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Discovered
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {source:"discovered"}) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Total Transfers
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN count(t) AS Total

reports.title: Transfers Per Day (last 30d)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() WITH date(datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time})) AS day, count(*) AS n WHERE day >= date() - duration({days: 30}) RETURN day AS Date, n AS Transfers ORDER BY day

reports.title: Wallets by Source
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet) RETURN w.source AS Source, count(w) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC

reports.title: Total SOL Volume
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN round(sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL

## Schema
- **pump_seed** — confirmed pump.fun trader (seeded from on-chain trade history)
- **discovered** — counterparty found via off-platform SOL transfers
- Every edge is a SOL *system transfer* that did **not** touch a pump.fun program

reports.title: Third-Party Wallets Bridging Multiple Pump.fun Accounts
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {source:"discovered"})-[t:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) WITH DISTINCT h, t, s WITH h, count(DISTINCT s) AS seeds, count(DISTINCT t) AS txs, round(sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS sol WHERE seeds >= 2 RETURN h.address AS Hub, seeds AS SeedCount, txs AS Transfers, sol AS SOL ORDER BY seeds DESC, sol DESC LIMIT 100

reports.title: Select Hub
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {source:"discovered"})-[:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) WITH h, count(DISTINCT s) AS n WHERE n >= 2 RETURN h.address AS value ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 100

reports.title: Net SOL Flow (+ = inflow)
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub}) CALL { WITH h OPTIONAL MATCH (h)<-[ti:TRANSFER]-() RETURN coalesce(sum(ti.amount_lamports),0) AS inbound } CALL { WITH h OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[to:TRANSFER]->() RETURN coalesce(sum(to.amount_lamports),0) AS outbound } RETURN round((inbound-outbound)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS NetSOL
> Select a hub wallet above to explore its connections

reports.title: Hub Neighborhood
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub})-[t:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet) RETURN h, t, s LIMIT 150

reports.title: Type
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) RETURN w.source AS Type

reports.title: First Seen
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) RETURN toString(w.first_seen_at) AS FirstSeen

reports.title: 2-Hop Neighborhood
reports.query: MATCH p = (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet})-[:TRANSFER*1..2]-(n:Wallet) RETURN p LIMIT 100

reports.title: Top Counterparties
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet})-[t:TRANSFER]-(c:Wallet) WITH c, sum(CASE WHEN startNode(t)=w THEN t.amount_lamports ELSE 0 END)/1e9 AS sol_out, sum(CASE WHEN endNode(t)=w THEN t.amount_lamports ELSE 0 END)/1e9 AS sol_in, count(t) AS txs RETURN c.address AS Wallet, c.source AS Type, txs AS Transfers, round(sol_in*1000)/1000 AS SOLIn, round(sol_out*1000)/1000 AS SOLOut, round((sol_in-sol_out)*1000)/1000 AS NetSOL ORDER BY txs DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: Recent Transfers
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet})-[t:TRANSFER]-(b:Wallet) WITH a, t, b, CASE WHEN startNode(t)=a THEN "OUT" ELSE "IN" END AS direction ORDER BY t.block_time DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}) AS Time, direction AS Dir, round(t.amount_lamports/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL, b.address AS Counterparty, b.source AS Type, t.signature AS Signature

reports.title: Top Wallet Pairs by Volume
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH a, b, sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9 AS sol, count(t) AS txs ORDER BY sol DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN a.address AS From, a.source AS FromType, b.address AS To, b.source AS ToType, txs AS Transfers, round(sol*1000)/1000 AS SOL

reports.title: Biggest Single Transfers
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) RETURN a.address AS From, b.address AS To, round(t.amount_lamports/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL, datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}) AS Time, t.signature AS Signature ORDER BY t.amount_lamports DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: SOL Flow (Top Pairs)
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH a, b, sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9 AS sol ORDER BY sol DESC LIMIT 25 RETURN a.address AS from, b.address AS to, sol AS value

reports.title: Transfers Per Day by Wallet Pair Type (last 60d)
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH date(datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time})) AS day, CASE WHEN a.source="pump_seed" AND b.source="pump_seed" THEN "seed→seed" WHEN a.source="discovered" AND b.source="discovered" THEN "disc→disc" ELSE "seed↔disc" END AS kind, count(*) AS n WHERE day >= date() - duration({days: 60}) RETURN day AS Date, kind AS Type, n AS Transfers ORDER BY day

reports.title: Transfers by Hour of Day (UTC)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}).hour AS Hour, count(*) AS Transfers ORDER BY Hour

reports.title: Transfers by Day of Week
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() WITH datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}).dayOfWeek AS dow RETURN CASE dow WHEN 1 THEN "Mon" WHEN 2 THEN "Tue" WHEN 3 THEN "Wed" WHEN 4 THEN "Thu" WHEN 5 THEN "Fri" WHEN 6 THEN "Sat" WHEN 7 THEN "Sun" END AS Day, count(*) AS Transfers ORDER BY dow
